title: TaCZ Additions
description: An addon for TaCZ that adds immersive and useful features
body: ### Requires Timeless and Classics Zero   TaCZ Additions is an addon for TaCZ that focuses on gunplay immersion as well as improving the experience for the players as much as possible. Keep in mind, this mod is early in development. * Gun movement; momentum-based * Gun tilt when moving side to side * Fully configurable values * Recoil Multiplier option (configurable based on guntype and horizontal and verticle) * Muzzle flash when shooting * Scope sway after 4x zoom(simulates sniping games) * Gun idle * Adds the ability to turn off the recoil going back up after shooting * Laser pointers for laser attachment (dynamic color based on attachment) * WIP text hover on the magazine to check ammo instead of the HUD *** **Report bugs or join for fun in the Zarra Studios discord here: [https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW](https://discord.gg/PVd6GNpvtW)** *** **Plans:** * **Add a custom smoke particle when shooting** * **Fix visual recoil configuration** * **Add more requested features** * **Config each value per gun category: Sniper, pistols, rifles, etc** *** A mod developed by Zarra Studios Please report bugs to the discord or github **Code is open-sourced** #### **This code is licensed under ARR** **If you use this mod please provide a link to our original page (Curseforge or Modrinth)**
